name: EtherDelta / ForkDelta API
description:
API for the EtherDelta decentralized exchange (now defunct, succeeded by ForkDelta). EtherDelta was an Ethereum-based decentralized exchange for ERC-20 tokens. The project is no longer actively maintained.

The API is primarily WebSocket-based (socket.io) at wss://api.forkdelta.com. WebSocket methods include:
- **getMarket**: Retrieve market data, trades, orders, and funds for a token/user
- **message**: Submit new orders with cryptographic signatures

WebSocket streaming events: orders, trades, funds.

This OpenAPI spec documents the single REST endpoint that was available. Rate limits: 6 concurrent connections and 12 reconnects per minute per IP address.

**Status: DEFUNCT** - EtherDelta ceased operations. ForkDelta (the successor) is also archived as of December 2022.
